_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: GRD-KRAS4B-C24 showed the most effective suppression of NF1 null cells. Three biological replicates were used.
details: GRDC24 showed most effective suppression of NF1 null cells compared to other GRD constructs
